name: duplicate-lead-merger
description: Identifies duplicate emails in a CSV, merges data into a master record based on recency, and outputs a clean list.

inputs.name: dirty_leads.csv
inputs.description: The input CSV file containing raw lead data with potential duplicates.

inputs.name: config.json
inputs.description: Configuration for column names and merge rules.

outputs.name: clean_leads.csv
outputs.description: The deduplicated master list of leads.

outputs.name: merge_report.csv
outputs.description: A log of which IDs were merged into which.
